
## Description

<!--
Before opening a Pull Request, please consider the following:

Most API operations are code-generated using `make api` from published OpenAPI
specification. There are exceptions for API that falls outside the /api/v2 path prefix.

The v1 package, which is not code-generated, is considered final. Critical bug fixes or
const additions are still considered. Additionally, the v1 package is no longer tested in
integration with HCP Terraform.
-->
## PCI review checklist

<!-- heimdall_github_prtemplate:grc-pci_dss-2024-01-05 -->

- [ ] I have documented a clear reason for, and description of, the change I am making.

- [ ] If applicable, I've documented a plan to revert these changes if they require more than reverting the pull request.

- [ ] If applicable, I've documented the impact of any changes to security controls.

  Examples of changes to security controls include using new access control methods, adding or removing logging pipelines, etc.
